notes: v2.1.0: dosage_form changed from pipe-string to array; available_strengths unit enum expanded;
timing_profile fields made nullable; drug_interactions note object removed to _ddi_note;
additive_risk_severity object added alongside boolean additive_risks;
riskFlags (graduated severity) added to align with backend engine & frontend DUR;
brand_names, allergy_class, formulary_status, active_ingredient added to drug_identity;
washout_period_days typed as float; pmc_rag added to ddi_source enum;
_extraction_metadata section added for two-pass pipeline provenance tracking;
organ_burden_logic now requires keyword-weight registry reference.
Fields marked // TODO: null cannot be sourced from Plumb's alone — require PMC/PubMed RAG pass.

drug_identity.active_ingredient: string — canonical active ingredient INN (may differ from brand name_en)
drug_identity.allergy_class: string | null — cross-reactivity class e.g. 'beta-lactam' | 'sulfonamide' | null
drug_identity.class: string — enum: NSAID | Corticosteroid | Antibiotic | Antiparasitic | Antifungal | Analgesic | Cardiac | Diuretic | Sedative | Antiemetic | GI Protectant | Anticonvulsant | Antidepressant | ACE Inhibitor | Bronchodilator | Immunosuppressant | Thyroid | Hormone | Antineoplastic Agent | Antiretroviral | Opioid | Muscle Relaxant | Reversal Agent | Unknown
drug_identity.source: string — enum: kr_vet | human_offlabel | foreign | unknown
drug_identity.formulary_status: string — enum: active | discontinued | restricted | unknown
drug_identity.reversal_agent: string | null — name of reversal agent if has_reversal is true
drug_identity.off_label_note: string | null — only for human_offlabel source
dosage_form: string — array of applicable forms, each from enum: Tab | Inj | Cap | Susp | Drop | Oint | Topical | Ophthalmic | Patch | Oral Liquid | Chewable

available_strengths.unit: string — enum: mg | mcg | IU | mg/mL | mcg/mL | IU/mL | mg/kg | mcg/kg | IU/kg | ml/kg | % | EA

metabolism_and_clearance.primary_metabolic_organ: string — enum: Liver | Kidney | Mixed | Unknown
metabolism_and_clearance.clearance_organ: string — enum: Kidney | Liver | Biliary | Mixed | Unknown
metabolism_and_clearance.renal_elimination_fraction: float 0–1 | null — e.g. 0.15 means 15% renally eliminated. null if unquantified in source.

substrates: string | null — CYP enzyme this drug is metabolized by, e.g. 'CYP2C9'. Empty array if not in Plumb's. // TODO: null — requires PMC/DrugBank RAG pass for most drugs.
inhibitors: string | null — CYP enzyme this drug inhibits. Empty array if not in Plumb's. // TODO: null — requires PMC/DrugBank RAG pass.
inducers: string | null — CYP enzyme this drug induces. Empty array if not in Plumb's. // TODO: null — requires PMC/DrugBank RAG pass.
cyp_profile.pathway_evidence: string | null — note on metabolic pathway from source

metabolism_and_clearance.extra_information: string | null — dog & cat specific PK notes or caveats from Plumb's

organ_burden_logic._methodology: Score = sum of weights assigned to triggered_keywords. Keyword-to-weight mapping MUST reference the shared keyword_weights registry (organ_burden_keyword_weights.json). Scores not backed by that registry are invalid. Scores derived purely from human data should be flagged in evidence.
organ_burden_logic.note: string — per-entry scoring note e.g. 'Based on human data only; no veterinary PK studies available'

brain.calculated_score: integer 0–100 | null — null if no data
triggered_keywords: string — keyword from keyword_weights registry that set this score
brain.index: integer — Plumb's section index, -1 if not directly cited
brain.evidence: string — Korean or English evidence note

timing_profile.onset_min: integer | null — minutes to onset of effect. null if not reported in Plumb's. // TODO: null for most drugs — requires PMC RAG or manufacturer SPC.
timing_profile.t_max_hr: float | null — hours to peak plasma concentration

half_life_hr._note: Store as object to capture reported ranges. Use mean only when range is unavailable.
half_life_hr.min: float | null — lower end of reported range (hours)
half_life_hr.max: float | null — upper end of reported range (hours)
half_life_hr.mean: float | null — mean or midpoint; use when only a single value is reported
half_life_hr.species: string — enum: dog | cat | human | unknown — species these values apply to

timing_profile.f_percent: integer 0–100 | null — oral bioavailability %. null if not reported.
timing_profile.protein_binding_percent: integer 0–100 | null — null if not reported.
timing_profile.evidence: string | null — source citation or note on data origin

_ddi_note: string | null — methodology note for drug_interactions list e.g. 'Extracted from Plumb's Drug Interactions section. Severity mapped: contraindicated→3, major→3, moderate→2, minor→1.'

drug_interactions.drug: string — interacting drug name or class e.g. 'Corticosteroids'
drug_interactions.evidence: string — English evidence note (English preferred for engine consistency)

additive_risks._note: Boolean flags for rapid rule-engine matching. Use riskFlags for graduated severity display.
additive_risks.nephrotoxic: boolean — additive renal load (triple whammy etc.)
additive_risks.sedation: boolean — additive CNS sedation (set true if somnolence/sedation is a reported adverse effect)

risk_flags._note: Graduated severity levels for frontend DUR display and backend rule scoring. Must be consistent with additive_risks booleans: if additive_risks.nephrotoxic=true then risk_flags.nephrotoxic must be 'moderate' or 'high'.
risk_flags.nephrotoxic: string — enum: none | low | moderate | high
risk_flags.hepatotoxic: string — enum: none | low | moderate | high
risk_flags.qi_ulcer: string — enum: none | low | moderate | high
risk_flags.bleeding: string — enum: none | low | moderate | high
risk_flags.qt_prolongation: string — enum: none | low | moderate | high

species_flags.mdr1_sensitive: boolean — P-gp substrate, dangerous in MDR1-mutant breeds
species_flags.washout_period_days: float | null — minimum days before switching (5 × half_life_hr / 24). Compute from half_life_hr.mean if available. null if half_life unknown.

dog.is_approved: boolean — species-level regulatory approval in Korean or country-of-origin market

dosage_list.logic_type: string — enum: linear | weight_band | fixed | max_capped | tiered
dosage_list.value: string — dose as string to support ranges e.g. '0.1 - 0.2'
dosage_list.unit: string — enum: mg/kg | mcg/kg | IU/kg | ml/kg | mg | EA
dosage_list.route: string — enum: PO | IV | SC | IM | Eye | Ear | Top | Inh | CRI
dosage_list.frequency: string — enum: SID | BID | TID | QID | q8h | q12h | q24h | q48h | Monthly | PRN | Once
dosage_list.duration_note: string | null — e.g. 'max 5 days' | 'taper after 7 days'
dosage_list.evidence: string | null — reference e.g. 'Plumb\'s 10th Ed, p.1234'

renal_dose_adjustment.creatinine_threshold_dog_mg_dL: float | null — trigger creatinine for dogs (IRIS Stage 2 ≈ 1.4–2.0)
renal_dose_adjustment.creatinine_threshold_cat_mg_dL: float | null — trigger creatinine for cats (IRIS Stage 2 ≈ 1.6–2.8)
renal_dose_adjustment.adjustment_type: string — enum: reduce_dose | extend_interval | avoid | none | unknown
renal_dose_adjustment.adjustment_factor: float 0–1 | null — multiplier e.g. 0.5 = half normal dose

hepatic_dose_adjustment.applies: boolean — true only for NTI drugs or drugs with primary hepatic elimination
hepatic_dose_adjustment.alt_threshold_multiplier: float | null — e.g. 3.0 = ALT > 3× upper normal triggers this
hepatic_dose_adjustment.adjustment_type: string — enum: reduce_dose | monitor | avoid | none | unknown

match_terms: string — EMR condition strings that auto-trigger this e.g. 'CKD'
contraindications.action: string — enum: contraindicated | reduce_dose | monitor | avoid

common_extra_effects: string — known adverse effects (English or Korean OK)

section_1_2_10.highlights: string — key clinical highlights (Korean preferred for EMR display)

_data_quality.overall_confidence: integer 0–100 — composite confidence; weight: dosage 40%, DDI 30%, PK 20%, organ_burden 10%
_data_quality.renal_adjustment_confidence: string — enum: high | medium | low | none. 'high' only if source explicitly states dose adjustment recommendation.
_data_quality.hepatic_adjustment_confidence: string — enum: high | medium | low | none. 'high' only if source explicitly states dose adjustment recommendation.
_data_quality.organ_burden_confidence: string — enum: high | medium | low | none. 'high' requires veterinary species-specific data.
_data_quality.ddi_source: string — enum: plumbs_direct | additive_class | cyp_derived | pmc_rag | unknown
plumbs_sections_found: string — list of Plumb's section keys that were populated e.g. 'Pharmacokinetics'
missing_sections: string — Plumb's sections that were absent or empty e.g. 'Pharmacokinetics'
_data_quality.requires_pmc_rag: boolean — true if any critical field is null/unknown and needs a PMC RAG pass
pmc_rag_fields: string — list of field paths that need PMC RAG e.g. 'cyp_profile.substrates' | 'timing_profile.onset_min'

_extraction_metadata.extraction_pass: integer — 1 = Plumb's pass | 2 = PMC RAG pass
_extraction_metadata.source_file: string — source JSONL file path e.g. 'plumbs_output/5.jsonl'
_extraction_metadata.reviewer: string | null — pharmacist reviewer ID if manually reviewed
